ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "class" TEXT /* Actual class of the image (e.g., ads_services, others) */,
  "image_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image */,
  "upload_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the image was uploaded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the image record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being predicted */,
  "class" TEXT /* Predicted class of the image (e.g., ads_services, others) */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the predicted class */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Overall confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "last_trained_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance metric was evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_images" (
  "user_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-image pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the image (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_images" (
  "model_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-image pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image used for training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was used for training */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split of the image in the dataset (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_images_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
